caption: The video shows a person streaming a session of FIFA Ultimate Team, specifically within the "Auction House" section of the game's Item Manager. The streamer is seen in a small inset window on the bottom left corner, wearing headphones and speaking into a microphone, likely narrating their actions or thoughts as they navigate the game. The main screen displays various filter options such as "Search," "Type," "Quality," "Team," "Program," and "Chemistry," all set to "All." The player's in-game currency and level are visible at the top right, indicating they have 173,037 coins, 0 FIFA points, 14,600 Volta coins, and 2,343,543 FIFA Ultimate Team points, with a level of 19 and an overall rating (OVR) of 91. The background features a festive Christmas tree, suggesting the video was recorded during the holiday season. The streamer appears engaged and animated as they interact with the game.
